prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 动漫啦啦队姿势图
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a bright anime cheerleader pose reference sheet for a sports-stadium performance, showing {argument name="character name" default="a silver-haired anime cheerleader"} demonstrating exactly 15 cheer motions in separate numbered panels.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 contact-sheet layout, 1280x720 style, divided into a clean 5-column by 3-row grid. Each panel has a thin white border, a blue circular number badge in the top-left, a white slanted title banner across the top with bold blue uppercase English text, and a dark translucent caption bar along the bottom with Japanese explanatory text.

Setting and visual style: Sunny outdoor football stadium with green field, running track, curved grandstands, vivid blue sky, fluffy clouds, energetic idol-cheer atmosphere. High-quality anime illustration, glossy promotional look, dynamic wide-angle camera, bright rim light, saturated blue-and-white palette, crisp details, motion in hair and skirt. The character wears a blue-and-white cheerleader outfit: cropped sleeveless top with star motif, pleated mini skirt, blue ribbons, thigh garter accents, ankle shoes, and large blue-and-white pom-poms. Long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} twin-tail hair with blue bows, cute expressive idol style.

Layout and exact panel list: Include exactly 15 panels, ordered left to right, top to bottom:
1. HIGH V — both arms raised high in a V shape with pom-poms.
2. LOW V — both arms extended diagonally downward in a low V stance.
3. T MOTION — arms stretched straight sideways at shoulder height.
4. TOUCHDOWN — one arm raised high and the other extended diagonally downward.
5. HIGH TOUCH — one hand reaches straight upward as if touching high, one leg lifted playfully.
6. LOW TOUCH — leaning forward with one arm reaching low toward the ground.
7. HALF TIME — hands placed on hips, ready stance.
8. CLAP — pom-poms brought together in front, clapping rhythmically.
9. PUNCH — one arm thrust powerfully upward with pom-pom.
10. SPIN — spinning in place, skirt and hair flaring outward.
11. KICK — high leg kick with energetic balance.
12. LUNGE — one knee bent deeply in a strong lunge pose.
13. JUMP — jumping upward with pom-pom raised and legs tucked.
14. BOW — polite forward bow with pom-poms gathered in front.
15. FINISH POSE — final celebratory pose with one arm raised and smile.

Text content: Use the English motion titles exactly as listed. Add Japanese captions similar to a cheer instruction guide under each panel, including these meanings: basic high V position, calm low V stance, synchronized shoulder-height team motion, one hand high and one diagonal, touch high to appeal height, low touch with sparkle, hands on waist for preparation, clap pom-poms to make rhythm, punch upward with strength, spin for華やか movement, dynamic high kick, strong lunge, jump to express energy, graceful bow of thanks, and smiling finish pose. Main title is not needed.

Constraints: Keep the grid perfectly readable and evenly spaced. Use exactly 15 numbered panels and no extra panels. Maintain consistent character design, outfit, colors, and stadium background across all panels. Make the typography bold and legible. Avoid logos, watermarks, and unrelated objects.
tags: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 动漫啦啦队姿势图

1: Create a cinematic hero image of a gourmet cheeseburger on a dark stone surface with glossy brioche bun, melted cheese, crisp lettuce, tomato, grilled patty, sauce, realistic texture, appetizing steam, warm side light, shallow depth of field, premium food commercial style, no text/logos/watermark.

Prompt 2: Create a 9-cell hybrid keyframe-to-transition storyboard sheet for a 15-second gourmet burger ad, moving from empty surface to ingredient assembly to final macro hero shot. Use large S cells and smaller T cells, motion arrows, ghosted ingredient positions, steam, sauce trails, and camera push-in icons. Style: premium food commercial, warm lighting, rich texture, appetizing, cinematic, minimal labels only. No logos, no watermark.

prompts.title: Luxury chocolate campaign system
prompts.prompt: a premium, square (1:1) product advertisement for a fictional luxury chocolate brand called Noirvelle Chocolat, inspired by high-end chocolate brands. The ad should feel like a high-end editorial campaign, combining luxury food photography, refined packaging design, and cinematic lighting. Use matte black wrapper, subtle gold foil, elegant serif typography, and realistic product rendering. Generate flavor variants such as Blood Orange Noir, Salted Pistachio Muse, and Raspberry Ember with distinct mood, color palette, ingredients, headline, and supporting copy. Keep the chocolate bar as hero centerpiece with subtle reflections, shallow depth of field, luxury minimalism, and a small CTA: "Shop the drop."

prompts.title: 纸上的手写法语诗歌
prompts.prompt: 一张 16:9 的逼真特写照片，展示了一张略带纹理的白纸斜放在中棕色的木桌上，以浅俯角拍摄。纸上用优雅的草书整齐地手写着一首简短的法语诗，使用的是鲜艳的 {argument name="ink color" default="蓝色"} 墨水。顶部的标题居中写着 {argument name="poem title" default="鸽子"}。下方是 4 行手写文字，居中且间距均匀：{argument name="poem line 1" default="Oiseau à la grise robe,"}，{argument name="poem line 2" default="Dans l'enfer des villes"}，“À mon regard tu te dérobes” 以及 “Tu es vraiment le plus agile。” 手写字体需保持优雅、清晰且自然，呈现出如同钢笔手写般的质感，而非印刷字体。柔和的室内暖光，纸张边缘带有细微阴影，纸张纹理清晰可见，构图简洁明快，完全聚焦于手写的诗歌。

prompts.title: 超写实波音 747 驾驶舱

prompts.title: “神秘森林禁区”书籍封面

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 赛博朋克动漫屋顶主视觉
prompts.prompt: Create a high-detail anime cyberpunk key visual of {argument name="character name" default="Tomoshibi Kii, short-haired version"}: a fierce young woman crouching on the narrow edge of a skyscraper rooftop high above a dense futuristic city at night. Use a dramatic vertical 2:3 composition, extreme high-angle perspective looking down into glowing canyons of buildings, with the character dominating the foreground and centered slightly right. prompts.title: Wimbledon Broadcast Crowd Shot
prompts.prompt: screenshot from a live Wimbledon TV broadcast during a packed Centre Court match. The camera cuts to the audience, an unbelievably attractive woman in her 20s with long black hair, flawless skin, elegant makeup, and a luxurious aura, seated in the VIP section wearing a sophisticated cream-white low-cut summer outfit with subtle jewelry. prompts.title: 宇宙墨龙吟
prompts.prompt: 一张极具戏剧性的垂直特写，展示了侧面咆哮的宇宙龙首，采用强烈的墨迹飞溅与笔触风格，背景为纯白色。生物长有尖锐的长角、棱角分明的装甲面部，眼睛闪烁着白绿色的光芒，巨大的嘴巴张开，露出参差不齐的牙齿。在口腔和喉咙深处，没有血肉，取而代之的是如星系般旋转的虚空，充满发光的 {argument name="energy color" default="violet"} 和洋红色星云光芒，闪烁的恒星与尘埃如宇宙之火般喷涌而出。龙身主要为黑色和深靛色，带有光泽感，颈部和鳞片上点缀着虹彩般的翡翠色反光。运用富有表现力、受水墨画启发的高对比度笔触、飞溅的颜料质感、撕裂的抽象边缘，以及集中在眼睛、嘴部和头顶的爆炸性粒子特效。构图应使头部向上倾斜并发出狂野的咆哮，填满整个画面，紧凑裁剪以达到极致的视觉冲击力，无需环境或其他主体，仅呈现原始的抽象能量、墨迹与天体碎片。

HE'LL TAKE EVERYTHING BACK."}，样式为由细红线分隔的 2 个短块。主标题横跨中下部，分为 2 个单词：第一个单词采用巨大的做旧金属白色块状字体，第二个单词采用稍小一些的粗体红色大写字母。在海报下三分之一处，展示 1 个孤独的男性背影，他站在湿漉漉的反光街道中央，手持手枪，面对着燃烧的城市。他周围共有 4 辆警车，左右各 2 辆，闪烁着警灯；远方地平线附近还有 2 架直升机，使整张海报中共有 3 架直升机。下方的两个角落点缀着火焰、残骸、烟雾、余烬以及远处几个武装人员的剪影。底部中央添加红色的发行文字 {argument name="release text" default="COMING SOON"}，下方配有较小的白色文字 {argument name="format line" default="EXPERIENCE IT IN IMAX"}。最底部添加一行密集的虚构制作人员名单和电影分级框。配色方案：黑色、炭灰色、钢灰色、橙色火焰和深红色。风格：精致的好莱坞大片主视觉，戏剧性的轮廓光，照片级真实感，超高细节，强烈的对比度，变形宽银幕动作照明，烟雾缭绕的氛围，爆炸性的城市混乱，高级院线海报设计。

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 日本AI咨询OGP横幅
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished Japanese OGP/social media banner for a B2B generative AI implementation support service, emphasizing AI becoming part of daily work.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 1200×630 px banner, clean corporate technology style, bright and trustworthy. Use a pale sky-blue to white gradient background with a soft sunrise glow on the right.

Layout: Place a semi-transparent frosted white rectangular panel slightly left of center, occupying about 55% of the width and 82% of the height, with a subtle white border and soft shadow. All main text sits inside this panel, left aligned. The right half shows a futuristic city skyline fading into the background, with sweeping highway-like light trails curving from the lower right toward the center.

Text content: At the top of the panel, add a small blue brand line with thin horizontal decorative lines on both sides: {argument name="brand text" default="Lightkeeper AI伴走"}. Beneath it, add a smaller dark navy subtitle: {argument name="subtitle text" default="中小企業の生成AI内製化・定着支援"}. The main headline is very large, bold, dark navy Japanese type on two lines: {argument name="headline text" default="AIを、\n日常の仕事に。"}. Near the bottom left, add a short gold horizontal accent line, then a smaller bold navy supporting message on two lines: {argument name="supporting text" default="研修で終わらせず、\n現場定着まで伴走します。"}.

Visual style: Use modern Japanese sans-serif typography, heavy weight for the headline, crisp spacing, high contrast navy text. Color palette: deep navy, medium corporate blue, soft white, pale cyan, and warm gold highlights. Add translucent floating UI panels in the background: exactly 5 faint panels, including 1 line chart card on the left, 1 donut chart card on the lower left, 1 bar chart card upper right, 1 organization/network icon card mid-right, and 1 small abstract data card far right. Add subtle hexagon patterns and small glowing particles, but keep the design uncluttered.

Constraints: Preserve the Japanese text exactly as written in the default values. No people, no logo icon, no watermark, no mockup frame, no extra text. Ensure the final banner feels like a professional landing-page hero or OGP image for an AI consulting service.
tags: 社交媒体帖子 - 日本AI咨询OGP横幅
